The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Motion For Award Of Reasonable Atty Fees
Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALISON B. KWAN OF BRADSHAW & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 433-4800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROSEMARY PONGRACZ AND ANTHONY STEVENS' Motion For Award Of Reasonable Attorney Fees IS Granted. No opposition filed. The court notes, however, that, while the fees sought may be disproportionate to the amount at issue, the absence of any opposition makes it infeasible to decide that issue. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Cost Of Proof - Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALISON B. KWAN OF BRADSHAW & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 433-4800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ROSEMARY PONGRACZ AND ANTHONY STEVENS' Motion For Cost Of Proof Sanctions IS Denied in light of the ruling on the motion for fees. Granting any part of this motion, after granting in full the motion for fees, would result in over-reimbursement and a windfall to the moving parties. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
